scripts.package:zip: zip -r dist/zentrixstream-${npm_package_version}.zip anime/ movie/ index.php LICENSE README.md EDUCATIONAL.md -x '*/.env' -x '*/db.php' -x '*/_config.php'
scripts.package:tar: tar -czf dist/zentrixstream-${npm_package_version}.tar.gz anime/ movie/ index.php LICENSE README.md EDUCATIONAL.md --exclude='*/.env' --exclude='*/db.php' --exclude='*/_config.php'
scripts.package: npm run package:zip && npm run package:tar
